arts.ttl: Alan Pardew makes Celtic and Ange Postecoglou claim after 'ridiculous' perception of Scottish League
arts.sum: But some people need to see sense when they continually berate the Scottish League and how it is seemingly ‘easy’ for someone like Celtic to be as dominant as they are. It’s fine to criticise Ange and the work he is doing as Tottenham boss – the London club are sitting 11th in the Premier League table.
CB: Leon King - The 20-year-old is in line for a rare start on the big occasion after Tavernier's injury. The midfielder scored in Rangers' Scottish League Cup final defeat in December.

arts.ttl: Pat Bonner says bench player under Brendan Rodgers has 'never let Celtic down'
arts.sum: Pat Bonner says Anthony Ralston ‘never lets Celtic down’ It’s as deep and as talented as it has ever been, with Pat Bonner wanting to give flowers to one man who produces whenever he is handed a chance.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers delivers brilliant derby pressure question response as Celtic prepare for Ibrox
arts.sum: Celtic are preparing for an exciting Scottish Premiership clash against Rangers at Ibrox, and Brendan Rodgers has spoken out ahead of the Glasgow Derby. When questioned on how he deals with the pressure of Glasgow Derby matches and whether he enjoys that responsibility, Rodgers made clear that he has a genuine love for the spotlight and solely focuses on guiding Celtic to yet another victory on the day.

Schmeichel has assumed number one duties since joining the club on a Bosman in the summer and conceded just four goals in the Scottish Premiership. Celtic head into Thursday's Old Firm derby 14 points clear at the division's summit with Rangers more concerned with Aberdeen in third as opposed to making a miraculous title tilt during the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Alan Brazil makes 'horrendous' Rangers claim not many Celtic fans will agree with
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers sealed a league and Scottish Cup double last season to draw level on silverware with Rangers last season. And after Celtic beat Rangers in the League Cup final this year, the Bhoys are now officially Scotland’s most successful club.

arts.ttl: Ricky Foster shares Glasgow Derby worry and explains why Celtic could put 'final nail' in Rangers' coffin
arts.sum: Speaking on the Warm Up podcast, Foster has admitted Celtic could put the ‘final nail in the coffin’ for Rangers this season if they take all three points at Ibrox. Celtic travel to face Rangers at Ibrox on Thursday and build-up is accelerating ahead of another Glasgow Derby meeting that could hold significant permutations.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers press takeaways as Celtic boss contradicts Rangers boss Philippe Clement's madcap sport science excuse
arts.sum: I’m driven by talking with players and getting the feel for them. The Belgian made seven changes from a team which lost to St Mirren the previous fixture and he claimed it was down to the sports science and medical team within Ibrox urging him to rest key men like Vaclav Cerny and Hamza Igamane.

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement's misery continues as key star out and another deemed doubtful to face Celtic
arts.sum: Philippe Clement in Rangers double injury before facing Celtic Speaking ahead of Celtic’s trip to Ibrox, Clement has confirmed James Tavernier will miss the clash due to injury, while also confirmed that Leon Balogun is a doubt as their defensive problems deepen.

arts.ttl: Under-pressure Philippe Clement in sports science U-turn and insists makes the big calls at Rangers
arts.sum: The Ibrox boss is copping severe flak after spilling points over Christmas ahead of Celtic showdown after the bells
